Party Rentals in Chester NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater and serves Chester by availability and travel quote with inflatable rentals, water fun, interactive games, lawn games, and event packages.

For Chester events, travel fees, setup suitability, staffing needs, and availability are confirmed before booking.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, By quote, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
  • Crown Axe Challenge - Interactive Game, $180, Dry-use - Inflatable axe throwing for friendly competition.
  • Crown Kick Darts - Interactive Game, $160, Dry-use - Giant inflatable football darts game for all ages.

Best For

  • Birthday parties
  • School celebrations
  • Community events
  • Family gatherings

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you deliver party rentals to Chester?
Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater and serves Chester by availability and travel quote. Travel cost and setup suitability are confirmed before booking.
Are bookings confirmed after submitting an online request?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Nova Kingdom Rentals confirms availability, travel cost, setup suitability, and deposit details before any booking is finalized.
What is included with every rental?
Delivery, setup, and takedown are included with every rental. The blower stays powered during use. Travel fees apply based on distance from Bridgewater.
What is the wind limit for inflatables?
Inflatables must not be used when sustained winds exceed 38 km/h. Use must stop immediately if winds reach or exceed this limit.
